description: arXiv:2607.07836v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We present Infinity-Parser2, a large multimodal model that couples a controllable data-synthesis pipeline with multi-task reinforcement learning for end-to-end document parsing, addressing the persistent scarcity of faithfully annotated parsing corpora. Our contributions are threefold. First, we build a scalable synthesis engine, pairing a con...
author: Zuming Huang, Jun Huang, Kexuan Ren, Baode Wang, Weizhen Li, Jianming Feng, Yu Wang, Yichen Yao, Shijun Lin, Yige Tang, Cheng Peng, Weidi Xu, Wei Chu, Yinghui Xu, Yuan Qi
